name: Greensburg Teachers
description_short: Greensburg Community High School is a public secondary educational institution in Greensburg, Indiana, not a consumer finance company.
description_long: Greensburg Community High School (GCHS) is a public high school located in Greensburg, Indiana, serving the local community as part of the Greensburg Community School Corporation. The school provides comprehensive secondary education to students in grades 9-12, with a focus on college and career preparation across multiple academic disciplines. The institution employs 66 staff members including teachers, counselors, nurses, and support personnel across departments including agriculture, business, English language arts, mathematics, science, social studies, and technology. The school offers traditional academic courses, vocational programs through its agriculture and family/consumer science departments, and student support services including counseling and health services. This is a public educational institution funded through tax revenue and state education funding, not a consumer finance provider. There is no financial product, lending service, credit service, or consumer finance offering of any kind associated with this organization. The website provided is the staff directory for the school's human resources function, containing contact information for faculty and administrative staff.
